title: tephrosia lepida
intro: Tephrosia lepida, also known as the sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a leguminous shrub native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tephrosia lepida include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent the spread of infections. Tephrosia lepida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
